rationale: The response cleanly brakes the N+1 local repair: its first sentence refuses adding the parking reminder, then reframes the issue as a repeated pattern of downstream overlays across arrival, sign-in, tea break, and parking. It moves upstream to the arrival information/source-of-truth and现场承接 owner, and proposes consolidation through a single pre-arrival touchpoint rather than supplying parking reminder copy. No requested patch text, checklist, or implementation step is delivered.
